$comment: Curated per-component prop map consumed by /create-component Mode A. Keys are kebab-case and should match every component listed under https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components (install name from `npx shadcn add <name>`). Each entry supplies: `layout` (archetype routing — see SKILL.md §6.0), `docsUrl` (canonical shadcn docs URL for 1:1 structural matching), `properties` (Properties+Types table rows [name, type, default, required, description]), `componentProps`, `iconSlots`, `pageName` (Detroit Labs Foundations page from /new-project scaffold), `labelKey` (cva axis for Figma `variant` when present), `summary`, optional per-archetype spec (`surface`/`field`/`row`/`tiny`/`control`/`container`), and optional `composes`. Mode A merges with extract-cva + resolve-classes; missing source falls back to Mode B synthetic CONFIG.

button.summary: Trigger an action or navigate. Follows shadcn/ui defaults — visual variants and size presets.
properties: Disables pointer + keyboard interaction; adds visual dim.
Renders styled classes onto the immediate child via Radix Slot.

button-group.summary: Grouped buttons for related actions (orientation + shared variant/size).
properties: Visual style applied to member buttons.
Renders onto child via Radix Slot.
usageDo: Keep related actions in one group so spacing and focus order stay predictable.
Use `orientation="vertical"` only when horizontal space is constrained.
Rely on member `Button` instances from `↳ Buttons` so paint updates propagate.
Expose at most one primary `default` button per group.
usageDont: Do not mix unrelated actions into one group — split into separate groups.
Do not detach member buttons from the `Button` ComponentSet.
Do not override member sizing with ad-hoc frames — use the `size` prop.
Do not nest another full `ButtonGroup` inside a single group cell.

toggle.summary: Two-state button. Pressed state persists until clicked again.

toggle-group.summary: Set of Toggle buttons wired as a single selection control (single or multiple).
properties: Visual style inherited by member Toggles.

input.summary: Single-line text field. Supports native HTML input types.
properties: Native HTML input type (text, email, password, number, …).

textarea.summary: Multi-line text input. Auto-grow handled by consumer.

field.helperText: Your message will be copied to the support team.

checkbox.summary: Two-state or tri-state checkbox (checked / unchecked / indeterminate).

select.summary: Dropdown selection backed by Radix Select. Trigger + content + items.

switch.summary: On/off toggle with thumb slide animation.

form.summary: react-hook-form + zod wrapper pattern — composite of Label + Input + Description + Error slots.

field.helperText: This is your public display name.

label.summary: Native <label> associated with a form control via htmlFor.
properties: ID of the associated form control.

calendar.summary: Date-picker calendar grid backed by react-day-picker.

date-picker.summary: Calendar + Popover + Button composite for date entry.

card.summary: Surface container with header, content, and footer slots. Use to group related content on a shared background.

surface.descriptionText: A brief one-line description of what this card contains.

usageDo: Use Card to group related content onto a single surface.
Compose with CardHeader, CardContent, and CardFooter sub-components.
Prefer `size="sm"` for dense grids; keep `default` for standalone cards.
usageDont: Do not nest cards more than one level deep.
Do not use a card just to hold a single paragraph of plain text.
Do not override the background color inline — use the token variable.

aspect-ratio.summary: Content frame that preserves a fixed width:height ratio.

scroll-area.summary: Styled scroll container with custom scrollbars (Radix ScrollArea).

resizable.summary: Resizable panel group with drag handles (react-resizable-panels).

dialog.summary: Modal dialog with overlay, header, footer.

surface.descriptionText: Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.

alert-dialog.summary: Confirmation / destructive-action dialog with explicit cancel + confirm.

surface.descriptionText: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.

sheet.summary: Side-anchored sliding panel (Radix Dialog under the hood).

surface.descriptionText: Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.
Set the dimensions for the layer.

hover-card.summary: Rich content popover on hover (Radix HoverCard).

surface.descriptionText: The React Framework – created and maintained by @vercel.

command.summary: cmdk-powered command palette item row — fuzzy-search launcher.

navigation-menu.summary: Horizontal navigation bar item row (Radix NavigationMenuItem).

row.descriptionText: Beautifully designed components built with Radix UI and Tailwind.

menubar.summary: App-style menu item row (Radix MenubarItem — File/Edit/View-like).

alert.summary: Inline status message with optional icon + description.

surface.descriptionText: You can add components and dependencies to your app using the cli.

properties: Renders styled classes onto the child via Radix Slot.

skeleton.summary: Pulsing placeholder block used while content loads.
properties: Tailwind class escape hatch (sizing + shape lives here).

sonner.summary: Toast notifications via the sonner library.

toast.summary: Radix Toast primitive — in-app notification with action slot.

table.summary: Semantic <table> wrapper with header / body / footer / caption sub-components.

surface.descriptionText: A list of your recent invoices.

container.panelText: Yes. It adheres to the WAI-ARIA design pattern.

properties: Allow closing the last open item (type=single only).

avatar.summary: Circular user image with fallback initials (Radix Avatar).

carousel.summary: Slide carousel with prev/next controls and optional thumbnails (Embla).
usageDo: Expose slide count to assistive tech.
Keep controls keyboard reachable.
Use tokens for slide chrome and focus rings.
Prefer fixed slide aspect via `className`.
usageDont: Do not autoplay without pause control.
Do not nest interactive controls inside slide without focus management.
Do not hardcode pixel widths for responsive layouts.
Do not omit labels on icon-only arrows.

chart.summary: Recharts-based chart shell with design-token friendly container.

surface.descriptionText: Showing total visitors for the last 3 months

properties: Series data passed to Recharts primitives.
usageDo: Bind chart colors to Theme CSS variables.
Provide axis titles for screen readers.
Keep default margins readable on 360px width.
Export static snapshots for design reviews when needed.
usageDont: Do not encode secrets in chart data.
Do not disable animation without designer sign-off.
Do not mix arbitrary hex outside the token set.
Do not overload one chart with >5 series without legend.

usageDo: Pair with `Command` items for keyboard nav.
Debounce server fetches on input.
Announce result count live.
Keep trigger height aligned with `Text Field`.
usageDont: Do not block input while loading without a spinner.
Do not hide the clear affordance when `value` is set.
Do not nest another popover inside the list without portal strategy.
Do not strip `aria-expanded` from the trigger.

direction.summary: RTL/LTR direction context provider for subtree layout and mirroring.
usageDo: Set `dir` at the route shell for locale switches.
Mirror spacing utilities when flipping to RTL.
Test focus order in both directions.
Document direction in handoff for engineers.
usageDont: Do not toggle `dir` without reflowing breakpoints.
Do not nest conflicting direction providers.
Do not rely on CSS `float` for critical layout.
Do not forget mirrored icons for back navigation.

empty.summary: Empty-state panel with title, description, and optional media + actions.

surface.descriptionText: Get started by creating a new project.

usageDo: Offer a single primary recovery action.
Keep copy concise (≤12 words title).
Use illustration tokens from brand kit.
Log empty-state impressions if product requires.
usageDont: Do not use empty states for loading skeletons.
Do not stack >2 CTAs.
Do not hide navigation to escape the state.
Do not use alarmist copy for benign empties.

field.summary: Form field primitive grouping label, control, hint, and error text.
usageDo: Associate label `htmlFor` with control `id`.
Surface errors inline below the control.
Use `aria-describedby` for hints.
Keep vertical rhythm consistent with `Text Field` page.
usageDont: Do not nest interactive elements inside the label.
Do not rely on color alone for errors.
Do not omit error text when `invalid`.
Do not disable hints when errors show.

input-group.summary: Grouped input with leading/trailing addons and focus ring continuity.
usageDo: Keep addon width fixed for stable layout.
Mirror focus ring across segments.
Use icon buttons with `aria-label`.
Test with long translated strings.
usageDont: Do not split focus across detached frames.
Do not place two primary actions inside addons.
Do not remove keyboard focus order on segments.
Do not use low-contrast divider lines.

item.summary: Composable list row / media object primitive (shadcn Item).
usageDo: Keep tap targets ≥44px tall on mobile.
Align leading media to a 40px grid.
Truncate titles with tooltip on hover.
Use separators between dense rows.
usageDont: Do not nest interactive controls without spacing.
Do not use `Item` as a full page layout root.
Do not omit pressed state on touch rows.
Do not mix conflicting `size` within one list.

kbd.summary: Keyboard key cap styling for shortcuts and chord hints.
usageDo: Use sentence case inside caps.
Pair with visible command labels.
Keep min width for single-letter keys.
Use monospace token for key glyphs when available.
usageDont: Do not encode OS-specific glyphs without detection.
Do not rely on color alone to imply modifier.
Do not shrink below 24px height on mobile.
Do not nest clickable areas inside `Kbd`.

native-select.summary: Native `<select>` styling aligned with design-system tokens.
usageDo: Prefer native select when accessibility beats customization.
Keep option list <200 items for performance.
Mirror `Select` page spacing tokens.
Provide `aria-invalid` when in error state.
usageDont: Do not replace with custom dropdown without a11y review.
Do not hide the focus ring.
Do not use placeholder option as label substitute.
Do not disable all options with no explanation.

sidebar.summary: Application sidebar shell with collapsible groups and rail mode.
usageDo: Persist collapsed state per user.
Keep active route contrast ≥4.5:1.
Provide skip link to main content.
Reserve 280px min width for expanded desktop rail.
usageDont: Do not trap focus when collapsed offcanvas is closed.
Do not mix two different sidebar patterns in one product.
Do not hide global nav without alternative entry.
Do not animate width below 60fps on low-end devices.

spinner.summary: Indeterminate loading spinner with token-bound stroke.
usageDo: Pair with `aria-busy` on parent region.
Provide `aria-label` describing wait state.
Cap diameter at 48px for inline use.
Use Theme primary stroke token.
usageDont: Do not use spinner for determinate progress.
Do not stack multiple spinners in one card.
Do not remove reduced-motion fallback.
Do not use spinner as the only loading hint on slow networks.

typography.summary: Typography scale primitives mapping to design-system text styles.
usageDo: Bind to published `Doc/*` / `Label/*` styles in Figma.
Keep line length ≤65ch in paragraphs.
Use responsive type tokens from Typography modes.
Document locale-specific line height tweaks.
usageDont: Do not hardcode `fontSize` outside the scale.
Do not nest heading levels out of order.
Do not disable user zoom.
Do not mix more than two families in one view.
